name: Vegetable Eggplant Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium eggplant, peeled and finely chopped
8 cups Chicken stock (or a combination of water and chicken stock)
1 14.5 ounce can tomatoes, coarsely chopped, including juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy large pot over low heat, cook the garlic, onion, carrots, celery, eggplant, and turnip until they begin to soften, about 5 minutes. Do not brown.
2. Add stock or other liquid. Bring liquid to a boil over high heat and skim off any gray foam that rises to the surface. Reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are crisp-tender, 7 to 10 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes and simmer 5 minutes longer. Stir in herbs, pepper, and salt.
